lines.en: Lily, come and help me make dumplings.
I want to learn! How do I start?
First, take a piece of dough and roll it flat.
Like this? It looks like a small circle.
lines.zh: 这样吗？看起来像一个小圆片。

lines.en: Good. Now put some filling in the middle.
lines.zh: 很好。现在在中间放些馅料。

lines.en: How much filling should I put?
Not too much. Now fold it and pinch the edges.
lines.zh: 不要太多。现在对折，把边捏紧。

lines.en: Mine does not look as pretty as yours.
It is your first time. You will get better!
lines.zh: 你第一次包。会越来越好的！

lines.en: I put a coin in one! Whoever gets it will be lucky!
lines.zh: 我在一个里面放了硬币！谁吃到就幸运！
